Visit Us

Experience HP at Sector 17

Step into our showroom at the heart of Chandigarh — right above the iconic Indian Coffee House. Since 1989, we've been the city's trusted destination for HP products.

Jetage Computer Traders

Address

SCO-12, 1st Floor, Sector-17-E

Chandigarh - 160017

Above Indian Coffee House

Business Hours

Monday - Saturday: 10:00 AM - 8:00 PM

Sunday: Closed

Contact

+91 98149 58295

info@jetageindia.in

Getting Here

By Car

Parking available at Sector 17 Plaza. 2-minute walk from parking.

By Bus

Sector 17 ISBT is 500m away. Auto-rickshaws available at the stand.

Landmarks

Above Indian Coffee House, near Neelam Cinema & Sector 17 Plaza.

SCO-12, Sector-17-E

Chandigarh

Heritage Location

Neelam Cinema

What to Expect

01

Hands-On Experience

Touch, feel, and test HP products before you buy. Our demo units are ready for you to explore.

02

Expert Consultation

Our trained staff will understand your needs and recommend the perfect product — no upselling, ever.

03

Instant Quotes

Get best-price quotes on the spot. We match online prices and offer exclusive in-store deals.

04

Same-Day Pickup

Most products are in stock. Walk out with your purchase or arrange delivery at your convenience.

05

Setup Assistance

We help with initial setup, driver installation, and connecting to your network.

06

After-Sales Support

Visit us for warranty claims, servicing coordination, and troubleshooting help.

Plan Your Visit

Can't make it to the showroom? No problem. We offer the same expert service and pricing via WhatsApp, with All India Delivery to your doorstep.

Get DirectionsSchedule Visit
JetageIndia

Authorized HP World Partner since 1989. Visit our showroom at SCO-12, Sector-17-E, Chandigarh — above the iconic Indian Coffee House.

SCO-12, 1st Floor, Sector-17-E, Chandigarh
Mon-Sat: 10AM - 8PM
